meta.title: NLX-labs | AI Solutions for Business
meta.description: Custom AI solutions that transform business operations. NLX-labs partners with SMBs to design, develop, and deploy tailored AI systems.
meta.ogDescription: Custom AI solutions that transform business operations. NLX-labs partners with SMBs to design, develop, and deploy tailored AI systems.

hero.headline: Tell us what's inefficient in your business. We'll build the AI to fix it.
hero.subheadline: NLX-labs partners with businesses to design, develop, and deploy custom AI solutions that deliver measurable results from day one.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: Three core capabilities that transform your business operations

items.title: AI Engineering
items.description: Deep technical capability in building AI-driven software systems, from intelligent automation to natural language processing and predictive analytics.

items.title: Business Process Analysis
items.description: We listen, understand, and map your operational workflows, identifying exactly where AI creates genuine, measurable value for your business.

items.title: Tailored Implementation
items.description: End-to-end delivery of custom solutions that integrate into your existing business infrastructure and produce results from day one.

services.positioningStatement: We don't sell off-the-shelf products. Every solution is custom-built to your specific workflow and business needs.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A structured, collaborative approach from discovery to deployment

steps.title: Discovery & Scoping
steps.description: We work closely with you to understand your operations, identify high-impact opportunities for AI, and define a clear scope with expected outcomes.

steps.title: Design & Development
steps.description: Full design, development, and testing of your AI solution with iterative feedback loops to ensure it meets your exact needs.

steps.title: Deployment & Integration
steps.description: Seamless deployment into your operational environment with system integration, staff training, and documentation for smooth adoption.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.description: Continuous monitoring, optimization, and expansion. We're a long-term partner invested in your ongoing success.

industries.title: What does your industry look like, powered by AI?
industries.subtitle: Select your industry to explore how AI transforms daily operations

items.name: Logistics & Customs
bullets: Classify and route shipping documents in seconds, not hours
Flag compliance gaps before they reach customs authorities
Optimize delivery routes in real-time with predictive demand
Auto-fill regulatory forms from scanned cargo manifests

items.name: Education
bullets: Generate adaptive assessments that match each student's level
Automate admin tasks like attendance, grading, and reporting
Identify at-risk students early with behavioral pattern analysis
Build personalized learning paths based on real performance data

items.name: Financial Services
bullets: Detect suspicious transactions in real-time with anomaly scoring
Generate compliance reports automatically from raw transaction data
Analyze client communications to surface sentiment and risk signals
Score portfolio risk continuously with adaptive ML models

items.name: Legal
bullets: Extract key clauses and flag risky language across contracts
Accelerate case research by surfacing relevant precedents instantly
Track billable hours automatically by linking tasks to matters
Reduce manual document review time by up to 80%

items.name: Healthcare
bullets: Optimize appointment schedules to reduce wait times and no-shows
Automate patient follow-ups and medication reminders
Process insurance claims faster with intelligent form extraction
Surface critical patient data from unstructured clinical notes

items.name: Government
bullets: Route citizen requests to the right department automatically
Accelerate permit approvals with AI-assisted document review
Allocate public resources based on real-time demand analytics
Generate transparency reports from structured and unstructured data

items.name: Retail
bullets: Predict inventory needs before stockouts happen
Resolve common customer inquiries instantly with AI agents
Forecast demand spikes across locations and product categories
Optimize pricing dynamically based on competitor and demand signals

industries.closingStatement: Don't see your industry? We work with any business that has processes to optimize.

about.title: About NLX-labs
about.subtitle: Making AI accessible for every business
about.narrative: Founded in 2026 in Israel, NLX-labs exists to make artificial intelligence accessible and actionable for businesses that don't have in-house AI capabilities. We believe the transformative power of AI should not be exclusive to tech companies or large enterprises. We listen first, engineer second, and build long-term partnerships that grow with your business.

founder.name: Yonatan Tal
founder.bio:
Yonatan Tal is the founder and lead developer behind NLX-labs. Before launching the company, he worked as an LLM developer in the Israeli startup scene — building the demo that helped one startup secure its initial funding round, and later joining the core engineering team to lead their language model product development. He's not just familiar with AI; he's built, fine-tuned, and shipped language models in production environments.

Yonatan combines deep expertise in large language models, NLP, and machine learning with full-stack engineering skills — meaning he can take a project from initial concept through architecture, development, and deployment without the overhead of a large team. When you work with NLX-labs, you work directly with the person who designs and builds your solution.

principles.title: Client Knowledge Leads
principles.description: You know your business better than anyone. We translate that knowledge into intelligent systems.

principles.title: Honest Assessment
principles.description: If AI isn't the right solution, we'll tell you. Trust is built through candor.

principles.title: Measurable Outcomes
principles.description: Every project has clear, quantifiable success criteria defined before development begins.

principles.title: Build for Independence
principles.description: We build systems you can own and operate. Our goal is to empower, not create dependency.

principles.title: Responsible AI
principles.description: Transparency, fairness, and data privacy at the core. Every system we build is explainable and ethical.

principles.title: Grow Through Excellence
principles.description: The best marketing is a client whose business was measurably improved.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Information We Collect

When you use our contact form, we collect the information you provide: your name, email address, company name, phone number (if provided), and your message. This data is processed through Formspree, a third-party form handling service.

How We Use Your Information

We use the information you submit solely to respond to your inquiry and to communicate with you about our services. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

Contact Form Data

Our contact form is powered by Formspree. When you submit the form, your data is transmitted to and stored by Formspree in accordance with their privacy policy. We encourage you to review Formspree's privacy policy for details on their data handling practices.

Cookies and Tracking

This website does not use cookies or any analytics tracking tools. We do not collect any data about your browsing behavior.

Your Rights

You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of any personal data we hold about you. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information below.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please email us at contact@nlxlabs.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using the NLX-labs website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website or services.

Services Description

NLX-labs provides custom AI consulting, development, and implementation services for businesses. The specific scope, deliverables, and terms of each project are defined in individual service agreements between NLX-labs and the client.

Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of NLX-labs and is protected by intellectual property laws. Client-specific deliverables are governed by the terms of the applicable service agreement.

User Conduct

You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe upon the rights of others or restrict their use of the website.

Limitation of Liability

NLX-labs provides this website and its content on an "as is" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any content. NLX-labs shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website.

Governing Law

These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Israel. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Israel.

Modifications

NLX-labs reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the website after modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

Contact Us

If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at contact@nlxlabs.com.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.content:
What Are Cookies

Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to website owners.

Our Cookie Usage

NLX-labs does not use cookies or any similar tracking technologies on this website. We do not collect any data about your browsing behavior, and no cookies are set when you visit our site.

Third-Party Services

Our contact form is powered by Formspree, a third-party service. When you submit the contact form, Formspree may use cookies or similar technologies as part of their service. We encourage you to review Formspree's privacy and cookie policies for more information.

Changes to This Policy

If we decide to use cookies in the future, we will update this policy and notify users accordingly. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

Contact Us

If you have questions about our cookie practices, please contact us at contact@nlxlabs.com.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.content:
Our Commitment

NLX-labs is committed to ensuring that our website is accessible to all users, including people with disabilities. We strive to meet the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA standards.

Accessibility Features

Our website includes the following accessibility features: semantic HTML structure for screen reader compatibility, keyboard navigation support throughout the site, sufficient color contrast ratios for text readability, responsive design that adapts to different screen sizes and zoom levels, skip-to-content navigation links, and support for reduced motion preferences.

Ongoing Efforts

We continuously review and improve our website to enhance accessibility. Our development process includes accessibility testing and we welcome feedback from users about their experience.

Feedback

If you encounter any accessibility barriers or have suggestions for improvement, please contact us at contact@nlxlabs.com. We take all feedback seriously and will work to address any issues promptly.
